faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: How do I install a MOGRT?
faq.a1: In Premiere Pro, open the Essential Graphics panel (Window > Essential Graphics), click Browse and import the .mogrt file.
faq.q3: Can I use these packs for commercial projects?
faq.a3: Yes, the included license covers commercial use for personal or client projects.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about JustEdit
faq.a1: A MOGRT (Motion Graphics Template) is an Adobe file format that lets you import animations directly into Premiere Pro via the Essential Graphics panel. It's the perfect format to save time in editing.
faq.q2: How do I install a MOGRT?
faq.a2: In Premiere Pro: open the Essential Graphics panel (Window > Essential Graphics), click Browse, then import the .mogrt file.
faq.a3: Our packs are compatible with Premiere Pro 2024 and above.
faq.q4: Can I use the packs for client/commercial projects?
faq.a4: Yes. The license included with each purchase covers use in personal and commercial projects (YouTube, social media, client videos, etc.). Resale or redistribution of the files is prohibited.
faq.a5: Yes, the templates are fully customizable. You can modify colors, text, durations, and most parameters directly from Premiere Pro.
faq.q6: How do I download after purchase?
faq.a6: After payment, you are redirected to a confirmation page with a download button. Your purchase is also accessible from your account area.
faq.q7: I can't download, what should I do?
faq.a7: Download links expire after 15 minutes but you can generate a new one from your account. If the problem persists, contact us at justmathis.contact@gmail.com.
faq.a8: Downloaded digital content is non-refundable. In case of a verified technical issue, contact us and we'll find a solution.
